subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-07-13
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness the Exalted One – may My spirit be a sacrifice unto Him – stated that one word or one verse of “Him Whom God shall make manifest”
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت اعلی روحی له الفدا میفرمایند که یک کلمه یا یک آیه من یظهره الله حجت است از برای جمیع من علی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @martyrdom of the Bab
